_comment: VS Code (GitHub Copilot agent mode) MCP config for the REAL Atlassian upstream (E16.E). Place at .vscode/mcp.json in your workspace. VS Code expands ${workspaceFolder}. The env block points run-proxy.sh at the real-tool-name manifest and an mcp-remote bridge to the Rovo MCP server; first launch opens a browser for OAuth. WINDOWS: UPSTREAM uses npx.cmd, not npx — harness mcp-gateway spawns the upstream directly (no shell), so the bare 'npx' (a .cmd shim) is not found on PATH. On macOS/Linux use 'npx'. After it starts, the Copilot tool picker should show only the 5 governed tools.
